annotations.summary: OTel gateway collector memory above 70% of its limit
annotations.description: otel-collector-gateway is using >70% of its memory limit for 5+ minutes. At 80% the memory_limiter processor starts silently REFUSING scraped data (log: 'data refused due to high memory usage') → 'No data' on Container CPU / CNPG / infra panels with no export error. Raise resources.limits.memory in observability/otel-collector/values-<mode>.yaml (managed-azure/aws self-scrape cAdvisor → 1Gi; oss/grafana-cloud delegate → 512Mi — see docs/301 § Per-mode metrics collection & collector sizing) or cut scrape cardinality. NoData is mapped to OK: grafana-cloud free tier drops cAdvisor by design, and this is a warning, not a liveness probe.
